excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE is a validated RoPE replacement
supported: A deterministic multi-initialization retrieval-bridge comparison on non-phase-cued RULER-style rows.
Every positional variant uses the same input feature width, hidden width, optimizer, epochs, and parameter count.
Confidence intervals over initialization seeds and explicit weak-run reporting.

model.trained_parameters: fixed-width feature-to-hidden weights, hidden bias, hidden-to-attention-logit weights, logit bias

task.description: Non-phase-cued passkey, multi-needle, and aggregation-style retrieval over Stage 12 rows.
task.scope: This is a matched feature-budget retrieval bridge, not a full decoder-only language-model benchmark.
task.target_construction: Targets are selected by explicit retrieval rules, not by the PhaseWrap score.
